text.title: Solo MRR Dashboard Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying solo-mrr-dashboard-template. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: MRR spikes by 12x in the month a customer signs an annual plan; tanks the next month. Investor update reflects the spike; the next one panics.
antipattern.root-cause: Annual payment booked as one-month MRR instead of (unit_amount / 12) for 12 months.
antipattern.fix: Apply r1 rule: annual ÷ 12 for the full 12-month term. Quarterly ÷ 3. Document the formula in templates/formula-card.md.

antipattern.symptom: Last month's "closed" MRR drops when you reopen the sheet; investors notice; trust collapses.
antipattern.root-cause: Refund retroactively deletes the subscription from the original month; live recompute differs from the published number.
antipattern.fix: Apply r2: refund subtracts in month M only. Apply r3: freeze the closed-month snapshot on the 5th; cite the snapshot in external reports.

antipattern.symptom: "MRR ex-trials" in the investor deck vs "MRR" in the support reply differ by 18%; the founder doesn't know which is real.
antipattern.root-cause: Multiple metric definitions stored side by side; nobody picked one.
antipattern.fix: Apply r4: one formula per metric, stored next to the dashboard. "Customer" = one-paid-subscription only (r5). Document in templates/formula-card.md.
